Task 04

Loop and Sum

LoopsMedium25 min
In Progress60% complete

Problem Description

Write a Python program that calculates the sum of all integers from 1 to n.

The program should ask the user to enter a positive integer n, then use a loop to calculate and display the total.

Example 1

Input

5

Output

15

Example 2

Input

10

Output

55

Use the editor area to write your solution in Python. The full code editor will be available in the next step.
